stage_label_zh: 週期中段 · capex 仍在加碼,但 H2 出現分化

hyperscaler_capex_2026e.source: MSFT + META + GOOG + AMZN guidance aggregated, latest earnings
hyperscaler_capex_2026e.threshold_note: early ≥ +35% YoY, mid +15–35%, late +0–15%, digestion < 0%. 2025 aggregate ≈ $300B reference.

hbm_contract_pricing.threshold_note: rising = early/mid bias, flat = mid, falling = late bias

abf_lead_times.source: DigiTimes / 工商時報 substrate channel checks

bis_export_control_delta.threshold_note: tightening this quarter = headwind shift; no change = neutral

current_call.rationale_en: Mid-cycle assumption is the working draft until 4 of 6 inputs are confirmed. Hyperscaler capex still rising into 2026 supports mid; HBM pricing flattening and substrate lead times shortening would shift to late. Override only after analyst confirms inputs.
current_call.rationale_zh: 中段為暫定假設,待 6 項輸入中至少 4 項分析師確認後再翻牌。Hyperscaler capex 仍在加碼利多中段;HBM 報價走平 + ABF 交期縮短若同時出現則翻向後段。

rule: Stage flips when 4 of 6 inputs cross thresholds simultaneously. Currently 0/6 confirmed — stage label is a draft anchor only.

history.note: Initial scaffold. All inputs draft pending analyst sign-off.
